title: Biomes Plus
description: adds weird and crazy new biomes to your world to make it more interesting and scary
body:
biomes plus adds new weird, crazy, and cursed biomes to your world to make it feel more interesting. currently there are 3 new biomes that have been added:

- Random - a biome of chaos and craziness
- Rich Land - a biome of wealth
- Squid Land - an aquatic like biome
